title: stelis glomerosa
intro: Stelis glomerosa, also known as the "clustered stelis," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis glomerosa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and roots are often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
